summary: Russian forces tested group deployment technology for strike drones using upgraded S350M Supercam UAVs capable of automatic target information exchange. Ukrainian forces intercepted and captured a Ukrainian "Shark-M" UAV after its parachute deployed due to a kinetic strike by the "Yolka" air defense drone in the Krasny Liman direction, while another "Yolka" intercept caused a Ukrainian "Hornet" UAV’s explosive payload to detonate. Ukrainian operators using FPV drones killed Russian soldiers, including one who attempted to feign surrender and flee, and successfully targeted motorcycle-borne assaults. Ukrainian forces in the Kostiantynivka direction survived an FPV drone attack after detecting the threat with a drone detector. The "Rubicon" Center reported 193 targets destroyed on April 14 and 107 on April 15, including Ukrainian fixed-wing UAVs and personnel, while coordinating with Russian Aerospace Forces.
